description: This file defines a Bootstrap Button component class, including its toggle functionality, event handling, and jQuery plugin integration.

classes.name: Button
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent that manages button toggle state and integrates with Bootstrap's data API and jQuery.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the 'active' class on the button element and updates the 'aria-pressed' attribute accordingly.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery to initialize and control Button instances via the jQuery plugin interface.
